steps.title: Write equations from percents
steps.content:
Convert each percent to a decimal:
$$567\%=5.67$$
$$0.945\%=0.00945$$
So the mass relationships are:
$$A=5.67B$$
$$A=0.00945C$$

steps.title: Compare masses B and C
steps.content:
Set the two expressions for $A$ equal and solve for $C$:
$$5.67B=0.00945C$$
$$C=\frac{5.67}{0.00945}B=600B$$

steps.title: Convert the ratio to percent
steps.content: If $C=600B$, then $C$ is $600$ times the mass of $B$. As a percent, that is: $$600\cdot100=60{,}000$$ The answer is 60000.
